use_cases: FAQ pages where users need quick answers to common questions
Settings panels with collapsible configuration sections
Documentation pages organizing content into expandable chapters
Product feature explanations that reveal details on demand
Navigation menus with hierarchical expandable categories
ai_summary: A clean, minimalist accordion component that displays expandable content sections with smooth rotation animations on the chevron icon. Supports single or multiple expanded items with configurable default states, hover feedback, and accessibility-focused focus rings. Perfect for organizing FAQ content, settings panels, or documentation in any SaaS or web application.
